---
title: "verify_fish.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/verify_fish.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.03
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 9.14
overall_score: 6.29
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating IntegrityVerifier, verify.

## Interaction Protocol
Import IntegrityVerifier and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 23 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `IntegrityVerifier`
- `verify`
